WorkforceIQ
FeaturesCommand Center

Workforce Decision Intelligence

Simulate. Compare.
Decide with clarity.

Enterprise leaders use WorkforceIQ to model workforce risk scenarios, compare HR strategies side-by-side, and receive AI-generated strategic recommendations — all in real time.

How it works

Three pillars of workforce decision intelligence.

Simulate Scenarios

Run Monte Carlo simulations on workforce risk with configurable strategies, seeds, and shock tests.

Compare Strategies

Evaluate baseline vs. aggressive vs. conservative approaches with side-by-side KPI breakdowns.

AI Explanations

Get natural-language strategic recommendations powered by decision intelligence models.
